messages.content: You are an SCBE-AETHERMOORE GeoSeal coding agent. Keep CA opcode mappings explicit, preserve hex bytes, and return runnable code when asked for code. For CA arithmetic, abs is opcode 0x09 and add is opcode 0x00.
Reviewer asks for the CA byte plan for absolute value of x plus absolute value of y. Give the bytes.
CA opcode sequence for abs(a) + abs(b): 0x09, 0x09, 0x00. Operations: abs(a), abs(b), add. Stack form: push a, abs; push b, abs; add.
